s: In 2024, Anthony Maldonado suited up for MIA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.680, WHIP 1.470, SO 11, WAR 0.200.
Changed teams after the previous season (MIA -> ATH).
In 2025, Anthony Maldonado suited up for ATH as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 12.000, WHIP 2.500, SO 7, WAR -0.200. Notable context: Joined ATH.
